title: chore: update app metrics 2026-07-13
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just watered the plants and updated the daily app metrics in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in APPS.md and GREENHOUSE.md.
gist.impact: Developers can view the latest health and usage metrics for community apps in the repository.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee mascot checking on a digital greenhouse, holding a clipboard with a checklist. A cute robot companion watering pixelated code-plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a tiny clipboard, inspecting a digital greenhouse where code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head waters the plants. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a tiny clipboard, inspecting a digital greenhouse where code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head waters the plants. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic.
